anti_bluff_classification: Class III — operator-completion-required gate. NOT a bluff (the agent cannot pretend to complete a real-device step it didn't perform). The §6.J / §6.L mandate explicitly carves this out: 'A test that the author cannot execute against the gating matrix is itself a bluff' — symmetric clause: a tag that the agent cannot author with real-device evidence is correctly refused by the constitutional gate.
